notes: v0.15.2 — NEON GEOMETRIC modules UI + drag-drop. Module loadout redesigned: ship texture in the middle of a schematic backdrop (grid + radial pulse + corner brackets), 6 slot cards anchored around it (WINGS/CORE/WEAPON top row, SHIELD/FRAME/ENGINE bottom row). Drag a library entry to a slot to equip; hover lights up the matching slot in cyan pulse so you see where it lands. Double-click to one-shot equip. NEON GEOMETRIC icon family — 6 procedural base shapes tinted by rarity color, no texture assets. Bot-difficulty mid-match hotkeys (1/2/3/4) removed — those keys are now exclusively active skills. Windows only.
